details.message: reports/board/ directory was missing and has been auto-created with .gitkeep. Verify it is populated by downstream board workflows.

moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with 5 active Python modules (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py) containing Moltbot references. Per governance contract, Moltbot code should have been removed. Additionally, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, and scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py contain Clawdbot/Moltbot references in code/config paths.
